api_key.title: Valhalla API key
api_key.description: API key from valhalla.nextron-systems.com. The default is the public demo key, which only grants the community feed.

base_url.title: Valhalla base URL
base_url.description: Override the Valhalla API base URL.

sekoia_api_key.title: Sekoia API key
sekoia_api_key.description: Bearer token from Sekoia (Settings → Workspace → API Keys). Required only for the Rules Catalog trigger.

sekoia_base_url.title: Sekoia API base URL
sekoia_base_url.description: Region-specific base URL. Default https://api.sekoia.io covers FRA1. For FRA2/MCO1/UAE1 use https://app.<region>.sekoia.io/api.
